【 Package Quantity】8 Pcs single stem artificial peony.( vase is NOT included)

description: Product description 💫Specifications: Flower Diameter: 3.93 inches/ 10cm. Height: Approx 12.59 inches/ 32cm. Package: 8 Pcs single stem artificial peony.( vase is NOT included). Superior Material: 10cm big blossom flower heads and leaves are made of ECO-Friendly silk（soft to your touch), durable PU stems with metal wire inside. Usage: Artificial single long stem peonies are very luxurious and elegant, perfect for decorating home, office, wedding, engagement, ceremony, party, hotel and more. Artificial peonies help you to save the trouble of watering real flowers, they never fall or wilt. Perfect DIY Floral Element: Big blossom flower heads are very popular in floral arrangments, adjustable long stem and well shaped artificial flowers are perfect choice for DIY flower bouquets, boutonnieres, table centerpieces, gift packages, etc. Realistic looking and non-fading color can help you achieve the perfect decorative effect. Maintenance of Artificial Flowers: ✅ In a ventilated and non exposure to sunlight environment, the lifetime of artificial flowers can be prolonged. otherwise, please replace them according to your needs. ✅ Only need to use a hair dryer to blow the petals once a week, if there is sticky dust, please use cold water to soak they for 3~6 mins, then use towel to swip petals gently, and then use clean cold water twice. then they will look like new. ✅ The squeezing in the shipment or delivery can't be avoided, please fume them with vapour and arrange the flowers and leaves after received them. ✅ Please double check the sizes before your purchasing, and adjust the flower length by bending or pruning the stems; graft branches or put some stones in the bottom of the vase to increase the height. JOYHAZE will keep to update the newest design of artificial flowers, so our customers can have more choices, if have any question, please feel free to contact with us from Amazon Message Center. Safety Warning This artificial plant contains silk materials. Use a hair dryer in cold wind mode to remove dust and prevent potential irritation.
